nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-05-11 150905_冰冰小美_商业航天交易是封神过的。没有涨的时候就交易了 中国卫星 。但是熟悉商业航天的，都知道中国星网。抖音天天发射卫星，一会儿登.md

nodes.rationale: The article attributes the sector's interest to BeiDou commercialization, civil-military integration, public planning and investment, constellation launches, security needs, and the Fifteenth Five-Year Plan.
